_metadata.description: Effect-size parameters for the Act 4 Monte-Carlo intervention simulation
_metadata.project: MIT LiftLab 2026 — From Nanostores to Classrooms
_metadata.note: sigma derived from published 95% CIs: sigma = (UB - LB) / 3.92. Intervention is future-facing: educating tomorrow's shoppers to close the intention-action gap found in Acts 2-3.

nutrition_education_only.source: Silveira et al. 2013, Preventive Medicine. Meta-analysis of RCTs, N=8722

physical_activity_only.source: Cochrane systematic review of school-based interventions

physical_activity_plus_nutrition.source: Cochrane systematic review (closest to our proposal)

adolescent_health_education_zscore.source: Brown et al. 2020, BMC Public Health. Adolescents 10-19

long_term_null_robustness.source: Hodder et al. 2021, Nutrients. Long-term interventions 6-12

behavioral_targets._description: Secondary outcome: closing the intention-action gap measured in Acts 2-3
behavioral_targets._note: Act 2 found 23.7% buy healthy vs 62.8% who say they would. The gap (39.1pp) is the behavioral target the intervention aims to narrow over time.

baseline_population.source: ENSANUT Continua 2020-2024 derived; WHO BMI-for-age cut-offs
